newsBriefing: Lens rallied to the Coupe de France semifinals by surviving Lyon's late comeback and winning the shootout 5-4 after a 2-2 draw, setting up a semifinal meeting with Toulouse.

games.headline: Lens survives Lyon comeback, wins shootout to reach Coupe de France semifinals
games.brief: Lens looked in control after building a 2-0 halftime lead, but Lyon stormed back through a quick strike from Djeidi Gassama and a stoppage-time equalizer from Alexandre Lacazette to force penalties. Florian Thauvin, who had scored and assisted in regulation, converted Lens's deciding spot kick as Lens advanced 5-4 in the shootout after a 2-2 draw. The result sends Lens into the semifinals, where Toulouse awaits.
bullets: Lens led 2-0 at halftime after goals from Florian Thauvin and Koyalipou in a dominant first half.
Lyon halved the deficit through Djeidi Gassama before Alexandre Lacazette equalized in second-half stoppage time.
Florian Thauvin finished regulation with a goal and an assist, then scored the decisive penalty in the shootout.
Lens won the penalty shootout 5-4 to clinch a semifinal berth.
Lens will face Toulouse in the Coupe de France semifinal round.
games.context: After surrendering a two-goal lead late, Lens still held composure from the spot and now sits one win from the final.

highlights.title: Lens vs Lyon | Coupe de France Highlights
